finding-auth-001.description: Service interface pattern: IPersistenceService defines abstract interface with FileSystemPersistence and NullPersistence implementations. IAuthService should follow same pattern.
finding-auth-001.relevantCode: export interface IPersistenceService { saveCollection, loadCollection, saveEntity, loadEntity }
finding-auth-001.recommendation: Create IAuthService interface with signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange methods. Implement SupabaseAuthService and MockAuthService.

finding-auth-002.description: Environment extension pattern: IEnvironment has services.persistence slot. Auth service should be added as services.auth following same structure.
finding-auth-002.relevantCode: export interface IEnvironment { services: { persistence: IPersistenceService }, context: { schemaName: string, location?: string } }
finding-auth-002.recommendation: Extend IEnvironment with optional services.auth: IAuthService slot. Auth is optional since not all stores need auth.

finding-auth-003.description: React context pattern: WavesmithMetaStoreContext provides metaStore + persistence via createContext/useContext. AuthContext should follow same pattern.
finding-auth-003.relevantCode: const MetaStoreContext = createContext<MetaStoreContextValue | null>(null); export function useWavesmithMetaStore() { ... }
finding-auth-003.recommendation: Create AuthContext.tsx with AuthProvider component and useAuth hook. Provider initializes auth service and AuthStore, subscribes to auth state changes.

finding-auth-004.description: Mock implementation pattern: NullPersistence is in-memory mock for testing with clear() method. MockAuthService should follow same approach.
finding-auth-004.relevantCode: export class NullPersistence implements IPersistenceService { private store = new Map<string, any>(); clear(): void { this.store.clear() } }
finding-auth-004.recommendation: Create MockAuthService with in-memory user store, configurable delays, and clear() for test isolation.

finding-auth-005.description: Test patterns: Tests use describe/test/expect from bun:test, createStoreFromScope for store setup. Auth tests should use MockAuthService.
finding-auth-005.relevantCode: import { describe, test, expect } from 'bun:test'; const result = createStoreFromScope(Domain); const store = result.createStore();
finding-auth-005.recommendation: Auth tests should use MockAuthService injected via environment, test signUp/signIn/signOut flows, error handling, and state synchronization.

finding-auth-006.description: No existing auth domain in state-api. New auth/ directory needed for types, services, and domain store.
finding-auth-006.relevantCode: Current structure: core/, environment/, meta/, persistence/, schematic/, utils/
finding-auth-006.recommendation: Create packages/state-api/src/auth/ with: types.ts (IAuthService, AuthUser, AuthSession), supabase.ts, mock.ts, domain.ts (AuthStore MST model)

finding-auth-007.description: Existing persistence tests validate interface contracts. Auth tests should follow same contract testing pattern.
finding-auth-007.relevantCode: Tests verify: 1) interface methods work, 2) null/mock behaves like real impl, 3) state consistency
finding-auth-007.recommendation: Create auth service contract tests that verify both SupabaseAuthService and MockAuthService satisfy IAuthService interface identically.
